product_overview: Aegis is an agentic command center that continuously scans high-velocity project data to surface strategic risks, propose interventions, and let founders promote and approve strategic bets and agentic actions from a single workspace.
core_goals: Discover strategic directions from recent issue data so founders can spot execution drift without reading every ticket
Declare and manage measurable strategic bets (hypothesis + metrics) to focus team efforts
Monitor overall project health and the status of active bets in a single dashboard
Review and approve or reject agent-proposed interventions via a human-in-the-loop inbox

features.name: Workspace Overview & Quick Actions
features.description: Central chat-based workspace that surfaces quick actions and guides users to core workflows (discovery, bet declaration, inbox, mission control).
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace -> See workspace overview and quick action list -> Choose a quick action to manage directions -> Navigate to /workspace/directions
Navigate to /workspace -> See workspace overview and quick action list -> Choose to review pending approvals -> Navigate to /workspace/inbox

features.name: Signal Discovery (Scan Linear & Proposed Directions)
features.description: Manually trigger clustering of recent issue data to produce proposed strategic directions for review and promotion into bets.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace/directions -> Trigger a scan of connected issue data -> Observe 'detecting' status and a list of proposed directions -> Review a proposed direction's summary and evidence -> Promote the proposed direction to a declared bet by adding a hypothesis

Navigate to /workspace/directions -> Trigger a scan of connected issue data -> Observe proposed directions -> Attempt to promote a direction without entering a hypothesis -> See validation prompting for a hypothesis -> Provide a hypothesis -> Promote the direction to a declared bet

features.name: Bet Declaration
features.description: Create a new strategic bet by specifying target segment, problem statement, hypothesis, and measurable metrics so the team can track outcomes against the bet.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace/directions -> Start declaring a new strategic bet -> Fill target segment, problem statement, hypothesis and success metrics -> Submit bet form -> See the new bet listed among active bets

Navigate to /workspace/directions -> Start declaring a new strategic bet -> Provide a hypothesis that is too brief -> Submit bet form -> See validation requesting a clearer hypothesis -> Update the hypothesis with more detail -> Submit bet form -> See the new bet listed among active bets

features.name: Mission Control Dashboard
features.description: High-level view that surfaces a real-time health score (0–100), the health visualization, and a compact status of active bets and interventions.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace/mission-control -> Observe the health needle visualization and numeric health score -> See a list of active bets with status indicators -> Select an active bet to read its summary and recent intervention activity

features.name: Agentic Inbox Approval
features.description: Inbox for human-in-the-loop approvals where founders review agent-proposed interventions and accept or reject them to control execution.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspace/inbox -> View list of pending interventions requiring approval -> Select an intervention to review -> Read the rationale and proposed action -> Approve the intervention -> See the intervention marked approved and queued for execution

Navigate to /workspace/inbox -> View list of pending interventions requiring approval -> Select an intervention to review -> Read the rationale and proposed action -> Reject the intervention -> See the intervention marked rejected and returned to draft

routes.description: Core chat-based workspace with quick actions and feature overview.
Real-time health scoring (0–100) and strategic bet tracking dashboard.
Manage and declare strategic bets manually or via clustered signals.
System event logs and agent debate history.

features.name: Bet Declaration
features.description: Create new strategic bets by filling out target segment, problem statement, and hypothesis.
user_interactions: Fill hypothesis and metrics in the modal

features.name: Mission Control Dashboard
features.description: High-level overview of project health and active interventions.

features.name: Agentic Inbox Approval
features.description: Approve or reject interventions proposed by Aegis.

known_limitations.issue: Backend state sync relies on 8s polling
known_limitations.impact: UI updates may feel delayed compared to agent execution.

known_limitations.issue: ADK runtime configuration warning on missing NEXT_PUBLIC_ADK_RUNTIME_URL
